finding: O(1) memory scaling for BPTT equivalent
details: Equilibrium Propagation requires constant memory regardless of trajectory length, unlike BPTT which scales O(T).
TileEQ variants arranged in a 2D locally connected grid demonstrate superior scaling on neuromorphic simulators vs fully connected counterparts.
A threshold of 2.0 provides stable contrastive separation on MNIST-level tasks without causing early layer saturation.
